display.purpose: Hero section headings only. Maximum 5-7 words. Set tight — negative tracking and sub-1.0 leading is the instruction.

headline.purpose: Section headings, page titles, course card titles.

title.purpose: Sub-section labels, feature callouts, nav items.

body.purpose: Prose, descriptions, blog copy. Cap at 65-72ch line length.

label.purpose: Category tags, pricing, course duration, form labels. Always uppercase monospace.

shadows.name: ember-glow
shadows.purpose: Focus ring on all focusable interactive elements. Replaces browser default outline. Not decorative.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: On card hover only. State signal — reinforces interactive affordance. Never applied at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all interactive state transitions (hover, focus). Ease-out-expo. Confident and deliberate.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: focus rings, button color transitions.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard UI state changes: hover, active, nav transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary call-to-action. Rectangular, Ember Red, uppercase monospace label.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #C8352A; color: #F0E8E7; padding: 14px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #8B2019; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(52% 0.22 27 / 0.35); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with a hairline border. Same rectangular shape.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: transparent; color: #F0E8E7; padding: 14px 40px; border: 1px solid #2E1A18; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 280ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #1F1311; border-color: #F0E8E7; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(52% 0.22 27 / 0.35); }

components.name: Course Card
components.description: Displays a single course: image, category label, title, duration, CTA.
components.html:
INTERMEDIATE · 8 WEEKS

Classic Cocktail Fundamentals

Master the canon — sours, stirred drinks, highballs — with technique-first instruction from working bartenders.

VIEW COURSE
components.css: .ds-course-card { background-color: #1F1311; border: 1px solid #2E1A18; border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: box-shadow 280ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-course-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 32px oklch(9% 0.006 27 / 0.7); } .ds-course-card__image { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/9; background-color: #2E1A18; } .ds-course-card__body { padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; flex: 1; } .ds-course-card__label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #C8352A; } .ds-course-card__title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #F0E8E7; margin: 0; } .ds-course-card__desc { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.65; color: #B5ACAC; margin: 0; max-width: 65ch; } .ds-course-card .ds-btn-ghost { align-self: flex-start; margin-top: auto; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard single-line input for the contact form. Dark-surfaced, Ember Glow on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field__label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #B5ACAC; } .ds-field__input { background-color: #1F1311; color: #F0E8E7; border: 1px solid #2E1A18; border-radius: 0; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-field__input::placeholder { color: #B5ACAC; } .ds-field__input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(52% 0.22 27 / 0.35); } .ds-field__input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: #C8352A; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Primary site navigation. Surface Raised background, Ember Red active underline, rectangular CTA.
components.html:
SKILL & MIX
  • Courses
  • Home
  • Blog
  • Contact
ENROLL NOW
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background-color: #1F1311; height: 64px; padding: 0 40px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2E1A18; } .ds-nav__brand { font-family: 'Geist Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #F0E8E7; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 40px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #F0E8E7; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #F0E8E7; border-bottom-color: #2E1A18; } .ds-nav__link--active { border-bottom-color: #C8352A; } .ds-nav .ds-btn-primary { font-size: 0.7rem; padding: 10px 24px; }

narrative.overview:
The design system is the interior of a serious cocktail bar — not a hotel bar, not a chain, not a pop-up activation. The surface is dark, architecturally spare, lit from the material itself. The background is predominantly near-black with a trace of ember in the tint. Red appears with total precision: on calls to action, structural highlights, and moments that demand to announce themselves. Everything else recedes.

Typographically, display headings carry visual mass through a variable serif. Body copy runs in a clean geometric sans that vanishes behind the words. Metadata and labels are rendered in monospace, telegraphing the technical discipline of a practiced bartender's annotated recipe card.

This system explicitly rejects: the course-platform aesthetic (soft blue, thumbnail-grid soup); the corporate hospitality look (beige-white, hotel brochure warmth); and the over-minimized cocktail-app design (pure white background, hairline type, mistaken for skincare).
keyCharacteristics: Surface-first darkness: the background is not a canvas — it is the design.
Red as a loaded, precise instrument: its rarity is its power.
Typographic authority: a display serif with visual mass paired with invisible body type.
Monospaced labels and metadata: technical craft made visible.
Confident stillness: every element feels placed, not arranged.

rules.name: The Ember Reserve Rule
rules.body: Ember Red appears on ≤15% of any given screen. Every use is structural or interactive. Decorative red — tinted washes, background fills, gradients — is not permitted.

rules.name: The Hierarchy Contract
rules.body: Each typographic level appears in one role only. Do not set body copy at Title size for emphasis — use weight contrast within the body role, or elevate structurally to Headline.

rules.name: The Tight-Display Rule
rules.body: Display headlines are set with negative tracking and leading below 1.0. This is not a default override — it is the typographic instruction.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Distinguish surfaces through background lightness steps, not box shadows. Reach for shadow only as a state signal (hover, focus).

dos: Do use Bar Black (#130D0C) as the default background. Dark tonal layering is the vocabulary.
Do treat Ember Red as the only accent. One loaded signal. Use it on CTAs, active states, and structural highlights only.
Do set Fraunces at Display weight with tight leading (0.92) and negative tracking (−0.02em). The headline should take up space.
Do write all metadata, pricing, category tags, and form labels in Geist Mono uppercase.
Do use 280ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) (ease-out-expo) for interactive state transitions.
Do distinguish surfaces through lightness steps (Bar Black → Surface Raised), not box shadows.
donts: Don't replicate generic course platform aesthetics — soft blue, grid of identical thumbnail cards, neutral sans-serif margin to margin.
Don't use the corporate hospitality look: beige-white backgrounds, hotel brochure warmth, muted palettes.
Don't design like an over-minimized cocktail app — pure white background, hairline type, maximum whitespace that reads as skincare.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Ember Red is a solid.
Don't use a left-border stripe accent on cards or callout boxes. Use a top border, full border, or background tint instead.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff) on any surface. Every neutral is tinted toward the brand hue.
Don't use bounce, spring, or elastic easing. Motion is choreographed, not animated.
Don't use neon or outer glow effects as ambient decoration. The Ember Glow is a focus ring, not an atmosphere.
